'''Sebairns''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] pilot of the private ship of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Erel Kersos]] who served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], he served onboard the [[MedStar-class frigate/Legends|MedStar]] under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Erel Kersos]] over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]]. During the [[Battle of Drongar|conflict on Drongar]], he had a certain leguminous substance [[Allergy/Legends|allergy]] and [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] agent [[Kaird]] didn't miss the opportunity to cause a sick leave, in order to fly away with the admiral's private ship.

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]'' {{1st}}
